recommendations.title: Nirvana: Unplugged In New York
recommendations.overview: A live album by American rock band Nirvana, the album features an acoustic performance recorded at Sony Music Studios in New York City on 18 November 1993, for the television series MTV Unplugged.

recommendations.title: Folklore: The Long Pond Studio Sessions
recommendations.overview: An intimate concert film, in which Taylor Swift performs each song from her album 'folklore' in order, as she reveals the meaning and the stories behind all 17 tracks for the very first time.

recommendations.title: Happier Than Ever: A Love Letter to Los Angeles
recommendations.overview: Fresh off the heels of her brand-new album, "Happier Than Ever," this cinematic concert experience features an intimate performance of every song in the album's sequential order – for the first and only time – from the stage of the legendary Hollywoo

recommendations.title: Wandering Stars
recommendations.overview: This film follows the making of Nekfeu's 3rd album, between Paris, Japan, Greece and the United States.

recommendations.title: Michael Jackson: The Life of an Icon
recommendations.overview: See Michael Jackson, one of the most recognizable and popular entertainers of all time, like never before in the feature-length tribute Michael Jackson: The Life of an Icon. Known to millions of fans worldwide for his record-breaking albums, groundbr

recommendations.title: Michael Jackson: Searching for Neverland
recommendations.overview: Based on the best-selling book, Remember the Time: Protecting Michael Jackson in His Final Days, and told through the eyes of Jackson's trusted bodyguards, Bill Whitfield and Javon Beard. The movie will reveal firsthand the devotion Michael Jackson h

recommendations.title: Thriller Night
recommendations.overview: A Shrek parody of Michael Jackson's Thriller song and music video, with Donkey singing.

recommendations.title: Sing: Thriller
recommendations.overview: Buster Moon dreams up a star-studded spectacle set to Michael Jackson's "Thriller" in this animated short featuring characters from the hit "Sing" films.

recommendations.title: Karol G: Tomorrow Was Beautiful
recommendations.overview: Karol G pulls back the curtain on her rise to stardom while navigating a sold-out stadium tour, creating new music and releasing a new album.

recommendations.title: A
recommendations.overview: A young alcoholic ambient musician locks himself in his apartment on a dangerous seven day bender as he attempts to finish his upcoming album.
